things.name: Memmingen Old Town
things.description: Beautifully preserved medieval town centre with walls, towers and merchant houses

things.name: Martin Luther Square
things.description: Main market square with the elegant Renaissance town hall and surrounding architecture

things.name: Church of Our Lady
things.description: Late Gothic hall church with original frescoes and remarkable carved altarpiece

things.name: Memmingen Museum
things.description: Regional history museum in the Antonierhaus with art and local history collections

things.name: Medieval Town Walls
things.description: Well-preserved ring of walls and towers encircling the old town

things.name: Sieben-Kindl Fountain
things.description: Charming fountain depicting the Seven Children legend central to Memmingen folklore

things.name: Fischermarkt
things.description: Annual fishermen's festival where fishing rights to the Stadtbach stream are auctioned

things.name: Schloss Kronburg
things.description: Medieval hilltop castle with a restaurant and commanding views over the Iller valley

things.name: Staudacher Weiher
things.description: Local nature reserve and swimming lake popular with cyclists and walkers

things.name: Memmingen Fuggerbau
things.description: Renaissance palace built by the powerful Fugger banking family
